name: Adventures & Quests - The black Crystal
short_description: The king's advisor sends you on an important mission. A sinister magician seeks the power of the black crystal and plans to unleash its dark powers. Start an exciting adventure with this fantastic hidden object game!
detailed_description:
The king's advisor sends you on an important mission. A sinister magician seeks the power of the black crystal and plans to unleash its dark powers.

Many before you have tried to unravel the mystery of the crystal, but none have ever returned!

A dangerous, challenging journey takes you to exciting places such as the Witches' Moor, the village in the mist or the eerie palace.

Explore your surroundings very carefully, discover their secrets and solve a variety of quests.

Get to know different characters and find lots of hidden objects that will be useful on your journey to confront the magician and his sinister helpers!

Start an exciting adventure with this fantastic hidden object game!

Features:

- Variety of hidden objects in fantastic hidden object scenes

- Tricky puzzles and quests for additional challenges
